new_value: {"notes":"Phase 1 research proved types are NOT in compiled-library varints (encrypted in __languagemodel.auxiliary). Adapted approach: created typeRegistry.ts with ground-truth IEC 61131-3 type mappings for standard FBs (SR, RS, R_TRIG, F_TRIG, CTU, CTD, CTUD, TP, TON, TOF, LTP, LTON, LTOF, SEMA, LCTU, LCTD, LCTUD + string functions). Integrated resolveParamType() into libraryZipReader.ts extractCompiledSymbols(). Added 4 type assertion tests to compiledLibExtraction.test.ts. 344/361 tests pass (17 pre-existing failures from missing fixtures)."}
